assertions.scriptName: COMMENT ON COLUMN persists col_description metadata
assertions.query: SELECT col_description('comment_target'::regclass, 2);

assertions.scriptName: COMMENT ON TABLE persists obj_description metadata
assertions.query: SELECT obj_description('table_comment_target'::regclass);

assertions.scriptName: COMMENT ON TABLE populates pg_description
assertions.query:
SELECT description
						FROM pg_catalog.pg_description
						WHERE objoid = 'pg_description_table_target'::regclass
							AND classoid = 'pg_class'::regclass
							AND objsubid = 0;

assertions.scriptName: COMMENT ON relation kinds persists obj_description metadata
assertions.query:
SELECT
							obj_description('view_comment_target'::regclass),
							obj_description('matview_comment_target'::regclass),
							obj_description('sequence_comment_target'::regclass);

assertions.scriptName: COMMENT ON index constraint and trigger persists metadata
assertions.query:
SELECT
							obj_description('comment_metadata_v_idx'::regclass),
							obj_description(
								(SELECT oid FROM pg_constraint
								 WHERE conname = 'comment_metadata_v_positive'),
								'pg_constraint'),
							obj_description(
								(SELECT oid FROM pg_trigger
								 WHERE tgname = 'comment_metadata_before_insert'),
								'pg_trigger');

assertions.scriptName: COMMENT ON SCHEMA persists obj_description metadata
COMMENT ON DATABASE persists shobj_description metadata
COMMENT ON DATABASE populates pg_shdescription
assertions.query:
SELECT description
						FROM pg_catalog.pg_shdescription
						WHERE objoid = (SELECT oid FROM pg_database WHERE datname = 'postgres')
							AND classoid = 'pg_database'::regclass;

assertions.scriptName: COMMENT ON FUNCTION persists obj_description metadata
COMMENT ON AGGREGATE persists obj_description metadata
assertions.query:
SELECT obj_description(
						(SELECT oid FROM pg_proc
						 WHERE proname = 'comment_aggregate_target'),
						'pg_proc');

assertions.scriptName: COMMENT ON TYPE persists obj_description metadata
COMMENT ON role and extension persists description metadata
assertions.query:
SELECT
							shobj_description(
								(SELECT oid FROM pg_authid
								 WHERE rolname = 'role_comment_target'),
								'pg_authid'),
							obj_description(
								(SELECT oid FROM pg_extension
								 WHERE extname = 'hstore'),
								'pg_extension');

assertions.scriptName: COMMENT ON procedure routine domain and language persists metadata
assertions.query:
SELECT
							obj_description(
								(SELECT oid FROM pg_proc
								 WHERE proname = 'comment_procedure_target'),
								'pg_proc'),
							obj_description(
								(SELECT oid FROM pg_proc
								 WHERE proname = 'comment_routine_target'),
								'pg_proc'),
							obj_description(
								(SELECT oid FROM pg_type
								 WHERE typname = 'comment_domain_target'),
								'pg_type'),
							obj_description(
								(SELECT oid FROM pg_language
								 WHERE lanname = 'plpgsql'),
								'pg_language');

assertions.scriptName: COMMENT ON collation and operator persists metadata
assertions.query:
SELECT
							obj_description(
								(SELECT oid FROM pg_collation
								 WHERE collname = 'C'
								   AND collnamespace = 'pg_catalog'::regnamespace),
								'pg_collation'),
							obj_description(
								(SELECT oid FROM pg_operator
								 WHERE oprname = '+'
								   AND oprleft = 'integer'::regtype
								   AND oprright = 'integer'::regtype
								   AND oprnamespace = 'pg_catalog'::regnamespace),
								'pg_operator');

assertions.scriptName: COMMENT ON access method persists metadata
COMMENT ON publication persists metadata
COMMENT ON subscription persists metadata
COMMENT ON text-search objects persists metadata
assertions.query:
SELECT
							obj_description(
								(SELECT oid FROM pg_ts_config
								 WHERE cfgname = 'simple'
								   AND cfgnamespace = 'pg_catalog'::regnamespace),
								'pg_ts_config'),
							obj_description(
								(SELECT oid FROM pg_ts_dict
								 WHERE dictname = 'simple'
								   AND dictnamespace = 'pg_catalog'::regnamespace),
								'pg_ts_dict'),
							obj_description(
								(SELECT oid FROM pg_ts_parser
								 WHERE prsname = 'default'
								   AND prsnamespace = 'pg_catalog'::regnamespace),
								'pg_ts_parser'),
							obj_description(
								(SELECT oid FROM pg_ts_template
								 WHERE tmplname = 'simple'
								   AND tmplnamespace = 'pg_catalog'::regnamespace),
								'pg_ts_template');

assertions.scriptName: COMMENT ON missing targets errors
assertions.query: COMMENT ON TABLE missing_comment_table IS 'ghost table';

assertions.scriptName: COMMENT ON missing targets errors
assertions.query: COMMENT ON COLUMN missing_comment_table.value IS 'ghost column';

assertions.scriptName: COMMENT ON missing targets errors
assertions.query: COMMENT ON FUNCTION missing_comment_function() IS 'ghost function';

assertions.scriptName: COMMENT ON missing targets errors
assertions.query: COMMENT ON ROLE missing_comment_role IS 'ghost role';

assertions.scriptName: COMMENT ON missing targets errors
assertions.query: COMMENT ON EXTENSION missing_comment_extension IS 'ghost extension';

assertions.scriptName: COMMENT ON missing targets errors
assertions.query: COMMENT ON PROCEDURE missing_comment_procedure() IS 'ghost procedure';

assertions.scriptName: COMMENT ON missing targets errors
assertions.query: COMMENT ON ROUTINE missing_comment_routine() IS 'ghost routine';

assertions.scriptName: COMMENT ON missing targets errors
assertions.query: COMMENT ON DOMAIN missing_comment_domain IS 'ghost domain';

assertions.scriptName: COMMENT ON missing targets errors
assertions.query: COMMENT ON LANGUAGE missing_comment_language IS 'ghost language';

assertions.scriptName: COMMENT ON missing targets errors
assertions.query: COMMENT ON COLLATION missing_comment_collation IS 'ghost collation';

assertions.scriptName: COMMENT ON missing targets errors
assertions.query: COMMENT ON OPERATOR + (integer, boolean) IS 'ghost operator';

assertions.scriptName: COMMENT ON missing targets errors
assertions.query:
COMMENT ON TEXT SEARCH CONFIGURATION missing_comment_ts_config
						IS 'ghost text search config';

assertions.scriptName: COMMENT ON missing targets errors
assertions.query:
COMMENT ON TEXT SEARCH DICTIONARY missing_comment_ts_dict
						IS 'ghost text search dictionary';

assertions.scriptName: COMMENT ON missing targets errors
assertions.query:
COMMENT ON TEXT SEARCH PARSER missing_comment_ts_parser
						IS 'ghost text search parser';

assertions.scriptName: COMMENT ON missing targets errors
assertions.query:
COMMENT ON TEXT SEARCH TEMPLATE missing_comment_ts_template
						IS 'ghost text search template';

assertions.scriptName: COMMENT ON missing access method errors
assertions.query:
COMMENT ON ACCESS METHOD missing_comment_am
						IS 'ghost access method';

assertions.scriptName: COMMENT ON missing publication errors
assertions.query:
COMMENT ON PUBLICATION missing_comment_publication
						IS 'ghost publication';

assertions.scriptName: COMMENT ON missing subscription errors
assertions.query:
COMMENT ON SUBSCRIPTION missing_comment_subscription
						IS 'ghost subscription';

assertions.scriptName: COMMENT ON missing policy errors
assertions.query:
COMMENT ON POLICY missing_comment_policy
						ON comment_policy_target IS 'ghost policy';

assertions.scriptName: COMMENT ON missing large object errors
assertions.query: COMMENT ON LARGE OBJECT 987654321 IS 'ghost large object';

assertions.scriptName: COMMENT ON missing tablespace errors
assertions.query: COMMENT ON TABLESPACE missing_comment_tablespace IS 'ghost tablespace';

assertions.scriptName: COMMENT ON TABLE requires table ownership
assertions.query: COMMENT ON TABLE comment_private IS 'unauthorized comment';

assertions.scriptName: COMMENT ON COLUMN requires table ownership
assertions.query: COMMENT ON COLUMN comment_column_private.secret IS 'unauthorized column comment';

assertions.scriptName: COMMENT ON relation kinds requires ownership
assertions.query: COMMENT ON VIEW comment_private_view IS 'unauthorized view comment';

assertions.scriptName: COMMENT ON relation kinds requires ownership
assertions.query:
COMMENT ON MATERIALIZED VIEW comment_private_matview
						IS 'unauthorized materialized view comment';

assertions.scriptName: COMMENT ON relation kinds requires ownership
assertions.query: COMMENT ON SEQUENCE comment_private_sequence IS 'unauthorized sequence comment';

assertions.scriptName: COMMENT ON index constraint and trigger requires ownership
assertions.query: COMMENT ON INDEX comment_metadata_private_v_idx IS 'unauthorized index comment';

assertions.scriptName: COMMENT ON index constraint and trigger requires ownership
assertions.query:
COMMENT ON CONSTRAINT comment_metadata_private_v_positive
						ON comment_metadata_private IS 'unauthorized constraint comment';

assertions.scriptName: COMMENT ON index constraint and trigger requires ownership
assertions.query:
COMMENT ON TRIGGER comment_metadata_private_before_insert
						ON comment_metadata_private IS 'unauthorized trigger comment';

assertions.scriptName: COMMENT ON SCHEMA requires schema ownership
assertions.query: COMMENT ON SCHEMA comment_private_schema IS 'unauthorized schema comment';

assertions.scriptName: COMMENT ON DATABASE requires database ownership
assertions.query: COMMENT ON DATABASE postgres IS 'unauthorized database comment';

assertions.scriptName: COMMENT ON FUNCTION requires function ownership
assertions.query: COMMENT ON FUNCTION comment_private_function() IS 'unauthorized function comment';

assertions.scriptName: COMMENT ON TYPE requires type ownership
assertions.query: COMMENT ON TYPE comment_private_type IS 'unauthorized type comment';

assertions.scriptName: COMMENT ON role and extension requires privileges
assertions.query: COMMENT ON ROLE comment_role_private IS 'unauthorized role comment';

assertions.scriptName: COMMENT ON role and extension requires privileges
assertions.query: COMMENT ON EXTENSION hstore IS 'unauthorized extension comment';

assertions.scriptName: COMMENT ON procedure routine domain and language requires ownership
assertions.query:
COMMENT ON PROCEDURE comment_private_procedure()
						IS 'unauthorized procedure comment';

assertions.scriptName: COMMENT ON procedure routine domain and language requires ownership
assertions.query:
COMMENT ON ROUTINE comment_private_routine()
						IS 'unauthorized routine comment';

assertions.scriptName: COMMENT ON procedure routine domain and language requires ownership
assertions.query:
COMMENT ON DOMAIN comment_private_domain
						IS 'unauthorized domain comment';

assertions.scriptName: COMMENT ON procedure routine domain and language requires ownership
assertions.query: COMMENT ON LANGUAGE plpgsql IS 'unauthorized language comment';

assertions.scriptName: COMMENT ON collation and operator requires ownership
assertions.query:
COMMENT ON COLLATION pg_catalog."C"
						IS 'unauthorized collation comment';

assertions.scriptName: COMMENT ON collation and operator requires ownership
assertions.query:
COMMENT ON OPERATOR + (integer, integer)
						IS 'unauthorized operator comment';

assertions.scriptName: COMMENT ON text-search objects requires ownership
assertions.query:
COMMENT ON TEXT SEARCH CONFIGURATION simple
						IS 'unauthorized text search config comment';

assertions.scriptName: COMMENT ON text-search objects requires ownership
assertions.query:
COMMENT ON TEXT SEARCH DICTIONARY simple
						IS 'unauthorized text search dictionary comment';

assertions.scriptName: COMMENT ON text-search objects requires ownership
assertions.query:
COMMENT ON TEXT SEARCH PARSER "default"
						IS 'unauthorized text search parser comment';

assertions.scriptName: COMMENT ON text-search objects requires ownership
assertions.query:
COMMENT ON TEXT SEARCH TEMPLATE simple
						IS 'unauthorized text search template comment';
